title: selaginella banksii
intro: Selaginella banksii, also known as the spikemoss or resurrection plant, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Selaginella banksii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system function. Selaginella banksii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also available in capsule or powder form for easier consumption.
